title: ecbolium distortum
intro: Ecbolium distortum, also known as the Indian spikenard, is a flowering plant native to the Western Ghats in India. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antispasmodic properties. The health benefits of Ecbolium distortum include its ability to aid in digestion, relieve respiratory issues, and alleviate pain. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, infusions, and decoctions, which can be used to treat various ailments, such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions.
